title: eliokarmos pilosus
intro: Eliokarmos pilosus, also known as the "hairy-leaved elm-wood" or "hairy-fruited elm", is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and even aiding in wound healing. Eliokarmos pilosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety are still being researched.
